title: August Gardeners' Digest

body:
A layout using chevron washi tape. Love the new colors.

Have you checked out the Two Peas in a Bucket gallery lately? Here are some that caught my eye.

1. Whipped White Alphabean Stickers - Seriously tempted to use these on every single layout.

2. Woodland Park 8X8 Paper Pad - Loving the colors and patterns - perfect for transitioning from summer to fall.

3. Grey Real Life Story Cards - These are not only great for Project Life, but I plan on using them in mini books and layouts as well. 

4. Wood Veneer Cameras - Say cheese!

5. These alphas. One full sheet in orange and one full sheet (on the back) in light blue. Love these tiny things.

Description: 

Memories fade quickly and making sure we include all our stories within our scrapbooks can seem daunting. In this Mini Workshop, Garden Girl Jen Gallacher shares her approach for meaningful journaling. Jen is a dedicated journal keeper and has kept personal journals for over 30 years (ever since she was old enough to write). Now she combines her love of record keeping with scrapbooking! This journaling-centered class covers topics from holidays, to day-to-day events, to family moments, and several often forgotten subjects.

Cost: $12

The content of this workshop will be available immediately upon purchase. The lessons are available for you to work at your own pace and upon purchase can be accessed in the "Workshops" section under "Classes & Events." A private message board forum is also available to ask questions for Amy and to connect with other participants. Enjoy! Remember, if you have already have signed up and you win, you can give the spot to a friend or get a credit! To enter: Just leave a comment with your 2Peas username (if you have one) along with your favorite word. Comments will close Friday, August 24 at 8am PST and a winner will be posted here shortly after. Next stop on the hop - Kandis
